overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The character travels from a covered walkway through neon-lit streets and enters a GalBank building before returning to the bustling street with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with glass walls and Trade Tower signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade toward the Trade Tower entrance

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian corridor with transparent glass walls and metal structural supports
large illuminated sign reading TRADE TOWER on the far wall
futuristic metal seating along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway with glass walls and a high ceiling. The Trade Tower sign is visible ahead, and the environment features clean, modern architecture with metal benches along the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with commercial buildings and neon signage

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open urban street with visible neon signs

agents.ego_description: continuing forward onto the city street toward the GalBank building

notable_agents.action: security guard or pedestrian standing near the building entrance on the left

entered.detail: large yellow neon sign reading GALBANK on the building facade
dark industrial building exterior with metal panels

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway onto an open urban street at night. The yellow neon GalBank sign becomes visible on the left, while industrial buildings line the right side. A lone pedestrian stands near the entrance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial urban alley with overhead pipes and neon advertisements

events.description: turns left and continues walking along the street toward the bank entrance

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking along the street past industrial pipes and neon signs

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the building wall

entered.detail: large rusted industrial pipes running overhead along the alley
colorful holographic advertisements floating above the street
glass entrance doors to the GalBank building with green interior lighting visible

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrower industrial alleyway with large overhead pipes. Colorful holographic advertisements illuminate the left side, and the GalBank entrance becomes visible ahead with its distinctive green interior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: bank interior with teller counters and green ambient lighting

events.description: enters the GalBank building through the glass doors

agents.ego_description: walking into the bank and approaching the teller counters

notable_agents.action: bank customer standing at the teller counter facing away from the camera

entered.detail: white and green futuristic bank counters with glass partitions
vertical wooden slat wall panels with warm lighting
illuminated yellow GalBank logo sign on the back wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters the GalBank building, transitioning to a green-lit interior with wooden panel walls and modern teller counters. A customer stands at the counter ahead as the character walks through the lobby toward the back.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with holographic advertisements and railings

events.description: exits the bank back onto the busy street with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: exiting the bank and walking along the crowded pedestrian walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green and gray outfit with white hat walking toward the camera
pedestrian in purple shirt standing by the railing looking at the view

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisements including a prominent skull image
red metal safety railing along the elevated pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bank back onto the bustling street, now on an elevated walkway with metal railings. The area is crowded with pedestrians, and vibrant holographic billboards float overhead, including a distinctive skull advertisement. The character walks past various NPCs including a person in a green outfit and another standing by the railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, modern pedestrian corridor into the neon-drenched industrial depths of a cyberpunk city. It begins inside a covered walkway with glass walls and high ceilings, moving past metal benches toward the distant Trade Tower sign. As the character emerges from the shelter, the scene opens onto a dark urban street where the yellow glow of a GalBank sign contrasts with the industrial buildings lining the right. The camera then turns left, shifting from the open road into a narrow alleyway dominated by overhead pipes and vibrant holographic advertisements. This progression finally leads toward the GalBank entrance, where the surrounding darkness gives way to a distinctive green interior light.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sterile, muted interior of a financial institution back into the vibrant chaos of a cyberpunk metropolis. It begins as the character enters the GalBank building, moving through a green-lit lobby characterized by wooden panel walls and modern teller counters. As the character passes a customer at the counter and reaches the back of the lobby, the scene shifts as they exit the building and emerge onto an elevated metal walkway. The environment then expands into a bustling street crowded with pedestrians, where the lighting transforms from the bank's soft glow to the neon brilliance of floating holographic billboards. The camera continues forward past various NPCs, including a person in a green outfit, while a distinctive skull advertisement looms overhead.
